Class TvShow

java.lang.Object
TvShow
public class TvShow extends Object
Name: Christopher Bain Course: 202620-CEN-3024C-23585 Date: 04/06/2026 Class Name: TvShow This class represents a single TV show record within the Database Management System. It serves as the data model and stores attributes such as ID, title, animation status, completion date, rating, and watch list status.

    the constructor of the TvShow.java that sets the value of the attributes if they enter a number for the is animated an on watch list options.

  • Constructor Details

    • TvShow

      public TvShow(int id, String title, boolean isAnimated, int completionMonth, int completionDate, int completionYear, double rating, boolean onWatchList)
      the constructor of the TvShow.java that sets the value of the attributes.
      Parameters:
      id - The id of the tv show
      title - the title of the tv show
      isAnimated - if the show is animated
      completionMonth - the month associated with the tv show
      completionDate - the date associated with the tv show
      completionYear - the year associated with the tv show
      rating - the user provided rating of the tv show
      onWatchList - if the show is on the watch list.

    • TvShow

      public TvShow(int id, String title, int isAnimated, int completionMonth, int completionDate, int completionYear, double rating, int onWatchList)
      the constructor of the TvShow.java that sets the value of the attributes if they enter a number for the is animated an on watch list options.
      Parameters:
      id - The id of the tv show
      title - the title of the tv show
      isAnimated - if the show is animated
      completionMonth - the month associated with the tv show
      completionDate - the date associated with the tv show
      completionYear - the year associated with the tv show
      rating - the user provided rating of the tv show
      onWatchList - if the show is on the watch list.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns:
      returns the id of the tv show

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns:
      returns the title of the tv show

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String input)
      Parameters:
      input - sets the argument to the value of the title for the tv show

    • isAnimated

      public boolean isAnimated()
      Returns:
      returns the boolean if the show is animated.

    • setAnimatedGui

      public void setAnimatedGui(boolean input)
      sets the value of the boolean type representing the animation status of the tv show
      Parameters:
      input - the use defined boolean to set the animation status of the tv show.

    • setAnimated

      public boolean setAnimated(int input) throws InputMismatchException
      sets the animated value of the tv show if the user enters an integer
      Parameters:
      input - the integer value the customer enters.
      Returns:
      a boolean that represents the animated status is returned.
      Throws:
      InputMismatchException - the error is thrown if the type that the user enters is not of type int.

    • getCompletionMonth

      public int getCompletionMonth()
      Returns:
      returns the month associated with the tv show.

    • setCompletionMonth

      public int setCompletionMonth(int input) throws InputMismatchException
      sets the month associated with thee tv show as entered by the user. it verifies the information and creates boundaries for it.
      Parameters:
      input - the value entered by the user for the associated date.
      Returns:
      returns the int value that the user is trying to set the date to.
      Throws:
      InputMismatchException - if the user doesn't enter a valid entry or an int type.

    • getCompletionDate

      public int getCompletionDate()
      Returns:
      returns the date associated with the tv show

    • setCompletionDate

      public int setCompletionDate(int input) throws InputMismatchException
      takes in the input from the user and wht they would like ot set the date associated with the tv show. Includes restricted boundaries for the date.
      Parameters:
      input - the user defined input that they woul like to set to the tv show.
      Returns:
      returns the set integer for the date associated with the tv show.
      Throws:
      InputMismatchException - if the entry is not of the type that is expected (int)

    • getCompletionYear

      public int getCompletionYear()
      Returns:
      returns the year that is associated with the tv show.

    • setCompletionYear

      public int setCompletionYear(int input)
      the functio for the user to set the year associated with the tv show
      Parameters:
      input - the user defined input that they are trying to set the year to
      Returns:
      returns an int that represents the associated tv show year.

    • getRating

      public double getRating()
      Returns:
      returns the rating associated with the tv show.

    • setRating

      public double setRating(double input) throws InputMismatchException
      function to set the rating associated with the tv show and enforces the boundary of the rating.
      Parameters:
      input - the rating that the customer tries to enter.
      Returns:
      returns a double representing the rating after the entry is validated.
      Throws:
      InputMismatchException - if the expected type is not entered an error is thrown.

    • isOnWatchList

      public boolean isOnWatchList()
      Returns:
      returns the watchlist status of the tvshow.

    • setOnWatchListGui

      public void setOnWatchListGui(boolean input)
      Parameters:
      input - sets the watch list value of the tv show.

    • setOnWatchList

      public boolean setOnWatchList(int input) throws InputMismatchException
      sets the value of the watchlist and enforces the validation of the input.
      Parameters:
      input - a integer submitted to the function is converted to a boolean by this function.
      Returns:
      returns a boolean that represents the entry of the user.
      Throws:
      InputMismatchException - is the entry is not of the expected type an error is thrown.

    • getIdFormated

      public String getIdFormated()
      Returns:
      returns the id with trailing 0's

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      returns the line of data in a formated way to be outputted to the screen.
